originContent: # Open-PAV
translatedContent: # Open-PAV

originContent: OpenPAV (Open Production Automated Vehicle) is an open platform designed to facilitate **data collection, behavior modeling, and performance evaluation** of production automated vehicle (PAV). It integrates diverse datasets and calibrated vehicle models, making it an essential tool for researchers and developers aiming to study PAV dynamics and their impacts. The project encourages contributions from the research community and provides ready-to-use model parameters for seamless integration with simulation tools. Check the [OpenPAV Website](https://openpav.github.io/OpenPAV) for more details.
translatedContent: OpenPAV (Open Production Automated Vehicle) is an open platform designed to facilitate **data collection, behavior modeling, and performance evaluation** of production automated vehicle (PAV). It integrates diverse datasets and calibrated vehicle models, making it an essential tool for researchers and developers aiming to study PAV dynamics and their impacts. The project encourages contributions from the research community and provides ready-to-use model parameters for seamless integration with simulation tools. Check the [OpenPAV Website](https://openpav.github.io/OpenPAV) for more details.

originContent: ## Data Sources and Contributors
translatedContent: ## Data Sources and Contributors

originContent: ### Original Data Sources:
translatedContent: ### Original Data Sources:

originContent: Currently the dataset has examined 14 open-source datasets from 7 providers, each providing distinct insights into AV behavior across various driving conditions and scenarios. They are:
translatedContent: Currently the dataset has examined 14 open-source datasets from 7 providers, each providing distinct insights into AV behavior across various driving conditions and scenarios. They are:

originContent: - **Argoverse 2 Motion Forecasting Dataset**. Collected from Austin in Texas, Detroit in Michigan, Miami in Florida, Pittsburgh in Pennsylvania, Palo Alto in California, and Washington, D.C. by Argo AI with researchers from Carnegie Mellon University and the Georgia Institute of Technology. Available at -  [Argoverse 2 Motion Forcasting Dataset](https://www.argoverse.org/av2.html).
translatedContent: - **Argoverse 2 Motion Forecasting Dataset**. Collected from Austin in Texas, Detroit in Michigan, Miami in Florida, Pittsburgh in Pennsylvania, Palo Alto in California, and Washington, D.C. by Argo AI with researchers from Carnegie Mellon University and the Georgia Institute of Technology. Available at -  [Argoverse 2 Motion Forcasting Dataset](https://www.argoverse.org/av2.html).

originContent: - **CATS Open Datasets**. Three datasets were gathered in Tampa, Florida, and Madison, Wisconsin by the CATS Lab. Available at - [CATS Lab](https://github.com/CATS-Lab).
translatedContent: - **CATS Open Datasets**. Three datasets were gathered in Tampa, Florida, and Madison, Wisconsin by the CATS Lab. Available at - [CATS Lab](https://github.com/CATS-Lab).

originContent: - **Central Ohio ACC Datasets**. Two datasets were collated in Ohio by UCLA Mobility Lab and Transportation Research Center. Available at - [Advanced Driver Assistance System (ADAS)-Equipped Single-Vehicle Data for Central Ohio](https://catalog.data.gov/dataset/advanced-driver-assistance-system-adas-equipped-single-vehicle-data-for-central-ohio).
translatedContent: - **Central Ohio ACC Datasets**. Two datasets were collated in Ohio by UCLA Mobility Lab and Transportation Research Center. Available at - [Advanced Driver Assistance System (ADAS)-Equipped Single-Vehicle Data for Central Ohio](https://catalog.data.gov/dataset/advanced-driver-assistance-system-adas-equipped-single-vehicle-data-for-central-ohio).

originContent: - **MircoSimACC Dataset**. Collected in four cities in Florida, including Delray Beach, Loxahatchee, Boca Raton, and Parkland by the Florida Atlantic University research group. Available at  - [microSIM-ACC](https://github.com/microSIM-ACC).
translatedContent: - **MircoSimACC Dataset**. Collected in four cities in Florida, including Delray Beach, Loxahatchee, Boca Raton, and Parkland by the Florida Atlantic University research group. Available at  - [microSIM-ACC](https://github.com/microSIM-ACC).

originContent: - **OpenACC Database**. Four datasets were collected across Italy, Sweden, and Hungary by the European Commission's Joint Research Centre. Available at - [data.europa.eu](https://data.europa.eu/data/datasets/9702c950-c80f-4d2f-982f-44d06ea0009f?locale=en).
translatedContent: - **OpenACC Database**. Four datasets were collected across Italy, Sweden, and Hungary by the European Commission's Joint Research Centre. Available at - [data.europa.eu](https://data.europa.eu/data/datasets/9702c950-c80f-4d2f-982f-44d06ea0009f?locale=en).

originContent: - **Vanderbilt ACC Dataset**. Collected in Nashville, Tennessee by Vanderbilt University research group. Available at - [Adaptive Cruise Control Dataset](https://acc-dataset.github.io/).
translatedContent: - **Vanderbilt ACC Dataset**. Collected in Nashville, Tennessee by Vanderbilt University research group. Available at - [Adaptive Cruise Control Dataset](https://acc-dataset.github.io/).

originContent: - **Waymo Open Dataset**. Two datasets were collected in six cities including San Francisco, Mountain View, and Los Angeles in California, Phoenix in Arizona, Detroit in Michigan, and Seattle in Washington by Waymo. Available at - [Waymo Motion Dataset](https://waymo.com/open/data/motion/) and [Vehicle trajectory data processed from the Waymo Open Dataset](https://data.mendeley.com/datasets/wfn2c3437n/2).
translatedContent: - **Waymo Open Dataset**. Two datasets were collected in six cities including San Francisco, Mountain View, and Los Angeles in California, Phoenix in Arizona, Detroit in Michigan, and Seattle in Washington by Waymo. Available at - [Waymo Motion Dataset](https://waymo.com/open/data/motion/) and [Vehicle trajectory data processed from the Waymo Open Dataset](https://data.mendeley.com/datasets/wfn2c3437n/2).

originContent: ### Processed Data Source:
translatedContent: ### Processed Data Source:

originContent: By organizing the data from the above datasets, we processed a unified trajectory dataset ULTra-AV, in which all data are represented using a standardized format. Available at -  [A unified longitudinal trajectory dataset for automated vehicle](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41597-024-03795-y) and [ULTra-AV](https://github.com/CATS-Lab/Filed-Experiment-Data-ULTra-AV).
translatedContent: By organizing the data from the above datasets, we processed a unified trajectory dataset ULTra-AV, in which all data are represented using a standardized format. Available at -  [A unified longitudinal trajectory dataset for automated vehicle](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41597-024-03795-y) and [ULTra-AV](https://github.com/CATS-Lab/Filed-Experiment-Data-ULTra-AV).

originContent: ## What's New
translatedContent: ## What's New

originContent: - **March 2026:** The project has launched a new interface.
translatedContent: - **March 2026:** The project has launched a new interface.

originContent: - **November 2024:** Initial project startup with installation and user guides.
translatedContent: - **November 2024:** Initial project startup with installation and user guides.

originContent: ## Major Components
translatedContent: ## Major Components

originContent: Open-PAV consists of the following components:
translatedContent: Open-PAV consists of the following components:

originContent: - **Data Process:** Given the raw AV data (LiDAR, images, videos, trajectories) as input, this module converts data of the same type into a unified format and performs preliminary data cleaning.
translatedContent: - **Data Process:** Given the raw AV data (LiDAR, images, videos, trajectories) as input, this module converts data of the same type into a unified format and performs preliminary data cleaning.

originContent: - **Behavior Modeling:** Using the processed AV data, this module calibrates the vehicle kinematic models of automated vehicles and exports them for simulation use. Users can also directly input their AV software stack to test their developed AV system within this module.
translatedContent: - **Behavior Modeling:** Using the processed AV data, this module calibrates the vehicle kinematic models of automated vehicles and exports them for simulation use. Users can also directly input their AV software stack to test their developed AV system within this module.

originContent: - **Accelerated Evaluation:** This module is designed to generate tailored safety-critical driving scenarios specific to a given AV model, aiming to evaluate its safety performance.
translatedContent: - **Accelerated Evaluation:** This module is designed to generate tailored safety-critical driving scenarios specific to a given AV model, aiming to evaluate its safety performance.
